name: My Quik n' Easy Pasta Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onion but not too finely. Set aside.
2. Put water on to boil for pasta.
3. In a large skillet, sauté onions over medium heat until translucent, about 5 minutes.
4. Add garlic and cook for another minute.
5. Add ground meat and cook until browned, breaking up the meat with a wooden spoon as it cooks.
6. If using lower grade meat, strain out excess fat using a fine-mesh colander.
7. Return the strained meat to the skillet.
8. Stir in tomato puree, canned tomatoes, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper.
9. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
10. Cook pasta (I prefer linguine) according to package instructions.
11. Serve the cooked pasta over the sauce.
